behavior_surfaces: CLI command surface now includes launchdeck agent paths, doctor, and install.
Agent installer resolves .agents/skills/launchdeck-agent as the canonical source package.
Installer supports codex, claude-code, github-copilot, and visual-studio project/user target directories.
Installer defaults to project scope, requires explicit --agent for install, supports --dry-run, --force, and --target, and refuses divergent targets without --force.
Compact JSON output preserves installer intent and result summaries without verbose per-file absolute copy paths.
Installer refuses non-directory target paths even when --force is supplied.
README documents the installer matrix and no-delete/no-remote scope.
.agents/README.md directs users to the cross-platform CLI and keeps PowerShell sync as a repo-local helper.
state_contracts: No Launchdeck lifecycle start, stop, restart, reconcile, clean, runtime state, run index, registry, log, or event behavior changed.
Project-owned agent skills remain canonical under .agents/skills/<skill-name>.
Host-specific directories are generated or synced targets, not source of truth.
Install copies source-managed files and never deletes target files.
Divergent target files are refused unless --force is explicit.
Non-directory target paths are refused regardless of --force.

verification.result: passed: returned canonical source and 8 scoped targets
passed: compact action counts plus relative files only

confidence_notes: Closeout uses explicit workflow-owned paths because git rev-parse reports F:/github as the top-level and the parent tree contains many unrelated sibling paths.
The implementation avoided real user/home agent directories by testing install with explicit temp --target directories.
Project cognition closeout-plan returned parent-tree unknown paths; they were excluded from this workflow-owned update rather than adopted.
user_decisions: User required .agents/skills/launchdeck-agent to remain the canonical source.
User required no lifecycle runtime behavior changes, no MCP, no marketplace, no remote publish/search/update, and no target deletion.

initial_dirty_paths: outside-scope: parent git root F:/github contains unrelated sibling and untracked paths
